description: Classic Pac-Man maze chase — eat all dots while avoiding ghosts, power pellets temporarily reverse the chase. Mobile-friendly with touch swipe + keyboard arrows, canvas-rendered maze with grid-snap movement, RAF game loop, localStorage high score and lives.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated from mchatai.com/u/GI1GHQ7w/c92bb121/ (publisher GI1GHQ7w, early version). Working tile-grid maze + ghost AI (separate behaviors per ghost) + power-pellet state machine. Mobile portrait layout with on-screen swipe controls. Preserve the maze grid + tile-snap movement model when modifying.
